description: Skill-level: routes /wicked-testing:plan inputs to the correct dispatch agent per skills/plan/SKILL.md dispatch table.

cases.prompt: Run /wicked-testing:plan on a user story describing a new checkout feature. The plan skill should route to test-strategist (not requirements-quality-analyst or testability-reviewer — the input is a feature description, not ACs or a design doc).
cases.notes: Confirms feature-description → test-strategist routing in skills/plan/SKILL.md.

cases.prompt: Run /wicked-testing:plan on a file containing acceptance criteria (AC-001, AC-002, AC-003 with SMART+T shapes). The plan skill should route to requirements-quality-analyst — the trigger is 'AC / clarify doc', not 'feature description'.
